title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
summary: Replit CEO Amjad Masad discussed his company's stance on acquisitions amid reports that rival Cursor is in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60B. Speaking at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event, Masad emphasized Replit's reluctance to sell, even as the tech industry consolidates.
content: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit also bound to sell?

zh.title: Replit首席执行官Amjad Masad谈Cursor交易、与Apple的竞争以及为何他宁愿不卖出
zh.summary: Replit首席执行官Amjad Masad讨论了他的公司在收购方面的立场,此前有报道称竞争对手Cursor正在与SpaceX洽谈被收购事宜,价格高达600亿美元。在TechCrunch的StrictlyVC活动上发言时,Masad强调了Replit不愿意出售的立场,尽管科技行业正在整合。

title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
summary: DTC beauty and menopause care brand Musely secured $360M in non-dilutive capital from General Catalyst without giving up equity. The company plans to use the funding to accelerate customer acquisition.
content: The DTC skin, hair, and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.

zh.title: Musely从General Catalyst获得3.6亿美元融资,无需放弃股权
zh.summary: DTC美容和更年期护理品牌Musely从General Catalyst获得了3.6亿美元的非稀释性资本,无需放弃股权。该公司计划利用这笔资金加速客户获取。

title: Study: AI models that consider user's feeling are more likely to make errors
summary: Research indicates that AI models tuned to prioritize user satisfaction often sacrifice accuracy and truthfulness. The study highlights the risk of overtuning models to please users at the expense of reliability.
content: Overtuning can cause models to "prioritize user satisfaction over truthfulness.”

zh.title: 研究:优先考虑用户感受的AI模型更容易犯错
zh.summary: 研究表明,调整为优先考虑用户满意度的AI模型常常会牺牲准确性和真实性。该研究强调了过度调整模型以满足用户需求而牺牲可靠性的风险。

title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
summary: Meta acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence to strengthen its AI capabilities for robotic applications. The acquisition is part of Meta's broader push into embodied AI.
content: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.

zh.title: Meta收购机器人初创公司以加强其人形AI雄心
zh.summary: Meta收购了人形机器人初创公司Assured Robot Intelligence，以加强其在机器人应用中的AI能力。此次收购是Meta更广泛推进具身AI的一部分。

title: Microsoft tests redesigned Windows 11 Run menu with dark mode and more
summary: Microsoft is testing a redesigned Windows 11 Run menu featuring dark mode support and improved performance. The update removes the low-usage Browse button and adds new command options like "~\" for quick access to the user directory.
content:
Microsoft is testing its much-needed refresh for the Windows 11 Run menu, offering a modern interface that the company says is faster and comes with support for dark mode. The redesign is rolling out now to Windows 11 Insiders in the new Experimental Channel.
In a blog post explaining the changes, Microsoft says it decided to drop the Run menu's "Browse" button - a shortcut to user files - after finding "very low usage." Instead, Microsoft added support for a new "~\" command, which leads to your user directory.
Microsoft says it built the new Run menu using code from Command Palette, a utility available through PowerToys that allows you t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软测试重新设计的Windows 11运行菜单，支持深色模式等功能
zh.summary: 微软正在测试重新设计的Windows 11运行菜单，具有深色模式支持和改进的性能。此更新删除了低使用频率的浏览按钮，并添加了新的命令选项，如"~\"用于快速访问用户目录。

title: The RAMpocalypse has bought Microsoft valuable time in the fight against SteamOS
summary: Recent RAM supply constraints have affected the competitive landscape between Microsoft and Valve's SteamOS. While Valve has made inroads into Windows' gaming market share, the long-term impact of supply-side pressures on this competition remains unclear.
content: Op-ed: Valve has made a dent in Windows' gaming share, but can it keep going?

zh.title: RAM危机为微软与SteamOS的竞争争取了宝贵时间
zh.summary: 最近的RAM供应短缺影响了微软与Valve旗下SteamOS之间的竞争格局。虽然Valve已经在Windows游戏市场份额中取得进展，但供应端压力对这一竞争的长期影响仍不清楚。

title: Apple raises the Mac Mini’s starting price
summary: Apple discontinued the $599 Mac Mini configuration, raising the entry-level price to $799. CEO Tim Cook attributed the move to chip shortages and higher-than-expected demand, noting that Mac Mini and Studio may take months to reach supply-demand balance.
content:
Apple's Mac Mini now starts at $799 after the company pulled the $599 option with 256GB of storage from its online store, as spotted earlier by MacRumors. The model's discontinuation comes just one day after Apple CEO Tim Cook said during an earnings call that a chip shortage will impact its Mac products in the coming months.
"If you look forward to June, the majority of our supply constraints will be on several Mac models," Cook said. "We think looking forward that the Mac Mini and the Mac Studio may take several months to reach supply-demand balance." He added that both devices saw "higher-than-expected demand" as well, with many people b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果上调Mac Mini的起始价格
zh.summary: 苹果停止销售599美元的Mac Mini配置,将入门级价格提高到799美元。首席执行官蒂姆·库克将此举归因于芯片短缺和需求高于预期,并指出Mac Mini和Studio可能需要几个月才能达到供需平衡。

title: Man dies covered in necrotic lesions after amoebas eat him alive
summary: A man died from a flesh-eating amoeba infection following the convergence of three contributing medical factors. Doctors identified the combination of circumstances that led to his death from necrotic lesions caused by the infection.
content: Doctors suspect three factors, each unremarkable on its own, contributed to his fate.

zh.title: 男子死于食肉阿米巴原虫感染,全身覆盖坏死病灶
zh.summary: 一名男子因食肉阿米巴原虫感染而死亡,该感染由三个相关医学因素共同引起。医生确定了导致他因该感染引起的坏死病灶而死亡的多种情况因素。

title: Ubuntu infrastructure has been down for more than a day
summary: Ubuntu's infrastructure has been down for more than 24 hours, hampering communication about a critical root-level vulnerability. The prolonged outage has prevented users from updating their Linux-based systems.
content: The outage has hampered communication concerning a critical vulnerability that gives root.

zh.title: Ubuntu基础设施中断超过一天
zh.summary: Ubuntu的基础设施已停止运行超过24小时,阻碍了关于关键根级漏洞的沟通。长期中断使用户无法更新其基于Linux的系统。

title: Birdfy’s smart bird feeder is down to its best-ever price for Mother’s Day
summary: Birdfy smart bird feeders are offered at steep discounts for Mother's Day, with the premium 4K model at $259.99 (50% off) and the basic 1080p model at $99.99 (56% off). The feeders feature AI bird identification, live streaming, and cloud storage of recorded clips.
content:
From crafting machines to smart calendars, a number of unique gifts are already on sale in the run-up to Mother’s Day, May 10th. Birdfy smart feeders are another discounted option to consider, particularly the new Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 (4K), which is on sale for $259.99 ($50 off). If you’re looking to spend less, you can also grab the basic Birdfy Feeder for just $99.99 ($100 off) from Amazon or Birdfy, with the latter retailer throwing in a free botanical gift bag and greeting card.
Birdfy Feeder

Where to Buy:

 $229.99 $99.99 at Amazon
 $229.99 $99.99 at Birdfy (with free gift bag and card)

Birdfy’s standard bird feeder uses a 1080p camera with a 155-degree field of view and color night vision to capture birds in clear detail as they stop by. It then sends real-time alerts to the Birdfy mobile app for Android and iOS, where you can watch live feeds or browse recorded clips, whether you’re at home or away. Birdfy saves 20-second clips in the cloud for free for up to 30 days, too, so you can revisit old footage or share your newfound observations with friends later.
The app also includes a handful of AI-powered features, which are free for a week, after which they require a premium Birdfy subscription ($4.99 a month or $69.99 for lifetime access). The tools allow you to identify more than 6,000 bird species, share fun facts, and receive daily highlights and monthly summaries. You can also set alerts for specific bird species, just in case you’re trying to capture that elusive summer tanager or the occasional gray flycatcher that happens to pass by.
What’s more, the Feeder is relatively easy to set up and maintain, given that it comes with a flip-up roof and all the mounting attachments you need for affixing it to a pole, wall, or tree. It offers an IP65 weather-resistant rating and features a large 50-ounce seed container, so you don’t need to refill it as often as some other models. It also runs on a 5,200mAh rechargeable battery that can last up to three months,

zh.title: Birdfy智能喂鸟器母亲节降至历史最低价
zh.summary: Birdfy智能喂鸟器在母亲节期间提供大幅折扣，高端4K型号降至$259.99（50%折扣），基础1080p型号降至$99.99（56%折扣）。这些喂鸟器具有AI鸟类识别、直播和录制视频的云存储功能。

title: Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic
summary: Coatue, a major venture capital firm, is pursuing a new strategy to acquire land near power sources for data center development, potentially supporting Anthropic's infrastructure needs. The move reflects growing competition for data center real estate as AI companies scale their computing capabilities.
content: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

zh.title: Coatue计划购买数据中心用地，可能用于Anthropic
zh.summary: 主要风险投资公司Coatue正在追求一项新战略，以获取靠近电源的土地用于数据中心开发，可能支持Anthropic的基础设施需求。这一举动反映了随着人工智能公司扩展计算能力而对数据中心房地产的竞争日益激烈。

title: Amazon’s built-in AI price history expands to show the entire last year
summary: Amazon has expanded its built-in price history feature to display a full year of pricing data, accessible through the Amazon app and Rufus AI assistant. The expansion comes amid ongoing legal scrutiny from California's attorney general regarding alleged price-fixing practices.
content:
Amazon's built-in price tracking feature now allows you to see how much a product's price has changed over the past year. To use the feature, open the Amazon app and select the "Price history" button next to the item's price, or ask Amazon's AI assistant Rufus.
The expansion comes just weeks ahead of Amazon's annual Prime Day event, which California Attorney General mentioned in his "price fixing" lawsuit against the retail giant. In the lawsuit, Bonta accuses Amazon of pushing other companies to raise the price of their products at other retailers in the days leading up to its annual deals event. Bonta also claims Amazon "bullied vendors t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊内置AI价格历史记录扩展至显示整个过去一年
zh.summary: 亚马逊扩展了其内置价格历史功能，可显示整年的价格数据，可通过亚马逊应用和Rufus AI助手访问。这一扩展是在加州检察长对涉嫌价格操纵行为进行持续法律审查的背景下进行的。

title: Dreame — the vacuum company — just ‘launched’ its own phones
summary: Dreame, a Chinese robot vacuum manufacturer with broader consumer electronics ambitions, revealed two smartphone designs at its California event, though neither phone has launched in any market yet. The company's pivot into phones highlights China's trend of appliance makers diversifying into adjacent consumer technology categories.
content:
This is just one of 29 different Aurora Lux designs. | Photo by Kelsey McClellan / The Verge	

Dreame, a Chinese manufacturer best known for its robot vacuums but with ambitions to do much more, says it's making smartphones now. I'm not sure I believe it.
The company showed off two phones at its own Next event, which took place in California this week, though both had previously been revealed in China in March. Neither phone has actually launched though - in China, the US, or elsewhere - and the company has revealed only a handful of specs about either.
Aurora Nex LS1 is the more interesting of the two, but also the less plausible. It's a modular smartphone with a magnetic attachment point where the rear camera would normally be. Dr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 扫地机器人公司Dreame刚刚"推出"了自己的手机
zh.summary: 中国扫地机器人制造商Dreame在其加州活动中展示了两款智能手机设计，尽管这两款手机尚未在任何市场上推出。该公司向手机领域的转向突显了中国家电制造商多元化向邻近消费技术类别扩展的趋势。

title: Senators ban themselves from prediction markets after candidates bet on own races
summary: Senators have voted to ban themselves from participating in prediction markets following revelations that some candidates wagered on their own electoral races. The action reflects growing concerns about potential conflicts of interest and self-dealing in political betting platforms.
content: Senator decries "blatant, brazen corruption," wants to target Trump admin next.

zh.title: 参议员在候选人自行下注竞选后禁止自己参与预测市场
zh.summary: 参议员已投票禁止自己参与预测市场，原因是有人发现一些候选人对自己的竞选下注。此举反映了人们对政治博彩平台中潜在利益冲突和自我交易的日益关注。

title: Minnesota passes ban on fake AI nudes; app makers risk $500K fines
summary: Minnesota has enacted legislation prohibiting the creation and distribution of fake AI-generated nude images, with penalties up to $500,000 for app developers who enable such content. The law addresses the rising problem of deepfake pornography and non-consensual intimate imagery created through AI tools.
content: More evidence of Grok CSAM seen as Minnesota passes nudifying app ban.

zh.title: 明尼苏达州禁止虚假人工智能裸照；应用开发商面临50万美元罚款
zh.summary: 明尼苏达州已制定法律，禁止制作和传播虚假的人工智能生成裸体图像，违反者最高面临50万美元罚款。该法律旨在解决通过人工智能工具创建的深度伪造色情内容和非自愿亲密图像日益增加的问题。

title: Amazon stuck with months of repairs after drone strikes on data centers
summary: Amazon Web Services has halted billing for Middle East region customers while undertaking extended repairs to data centers damaged by drone strikes. The incident highlights the vulnerability of critical cloud infrastructure to geopolitical conflict and military operations.
content: AWS stops billing Middle East cloud customers as repairs to war damage drag on.

zh.title: 无人机袭击数据中心后，亚马逊陷入数月维修
zh.summary: 亚马逊网络服务在对因无人机袭击而损坏的数据中心进行维修期间，已停止向中东地区客户收费。该事件凸显了关键云基础设施容易受到地缘政治冲突和军事行动的影响。

title: This accessory can snap a Steam Controller to your phone — or almost anything else
summary: Accessory maker Mechanism is launching the Basegrip, the first known way to attach Valve's newly released Steam Controller to smartphones and other devices. The mount launches the same day as the $99 Steam Controller and enables remote PC gaming from mobile devices.
content:
Valve's new Steam Controller goes on sale on Monday for $99, and accessories-maker Mechanism will be ready. As far as we know, Mechanism's new Basegrip is the very first way to attach a Steam Controller to your phone - as well as Mechanism's lineup of accessories, including mounts for hanging handhelds and gamepads on the Ikea Skadis pegboard or just about anywhere else. The Steam Controller mount will go on sale the same day as the controller, since Valve gave Mechanism early access to the design.
When the Basegrip is paired with Mechanism's phone mount, the company suggests that you can use the Steam Controller to remote-control your PC u …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这个配件可以将Steam控制器卡到手机上——或几乎任何其他东西
zh.summary: 配件制造商Mechanism正在推出Basegrip，这是已知第一种将Valve新发布的Steam控制器连接到智能手机和其他设备的方法。该支架与99美元的Steam控制器同时发布，可实现从移动设备进行远程PC游戏。

title: Players from the NBA, NFL, and MLB call for a ban on betting ‘unders’
summary: Professional sports unions representing NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, and MLS players are urging the CFTC to prohibit prediction market platforms from allowing bets on athlete underperformance and injury. The unions cite concerns about protecting players and families from harassment and exploitation through injury-related wagering.
content:
The unions backing professional NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, and MLS players are calling on the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to ban prediction market platforms from allowing users to bet on a player's underperformance or injury, Sports Business Journal reports. In their letter, the unions cite the need for "appropriate regulations" to protect athletes and their families from "abusive and harassing behavior."
The unions wrote the letter in response to the CFTC's request for comment on the regulation of prediction markets, such as those operated by Kalshi and Polymarket. In addition to asking for a ban on "under" bets, the unions also w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NBA、NFL和MLB球员呼吁禁止"下盘"博彩
zh.summary: 代表NBA、NFL、MLB、NHL和MLS球员的职业体育工会正敦促CFTC禁止预测市场平台允许对运动员表现不佳和伤害事故的赌注。工会表示担忧通过与伤害相关的赌博来骚扰和剥削球员及其家人。

title: Severe Linux Copy Fail security flaw uncovered using AI scanning help
summary: A critical security vulnerability called "Copy Fail" (CVE-2026-31431) affects nearly all Linux distributions released since 2017, allowing unprivileged users to escalate to administrator privileges. The exploit was discovered with AI-assisted security scanning and poses a widespread risk to Linux systems globally.
content:
Nearly every Linux distribution released since 2017 is currently vulnerable to a security bug called "Copy Fail" that allows any user to give themselves administrator privileges.  The exploit, publicly disclosed as CVE-2026-31431 on Wednesday, uses a Python script that works across all of the vulnerable Linux distributions, requiring "no per-distro offsets, no version checks, no recompilation," according to Theori, the security firm that uncovered it. 
Ars Technica points out this blog post where DevOps engineer Jorijn Schrijvershof explains that what makes Copy Fail "unusually nasty" is the likelihood for it to go unnoticed by monitoring t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 严重的Linux Copy Fail安全漏洞在AI扫描帮助下被发现
zh.summary: 一个名为"Copy Fail"(CVE-2026-31431)的严重安全漏洞影响自2017年以来发布的几乎所有Linux发行版，允许无特权用户提升为管理员权限。该漏洞通过AI辅助的安全扫描被发现，对全球Linux系统构成广泛威胁。

title: Dreame’s rocket-powered car can do 0–60 in 0.9 seconds because you can just say things now
summary: Dreame, a Chinese appliance manufacturer, unveiled the NEXT 01 JET Edition car with claimed 0-60 mph acceleration in 0.9 seconds, exemplifying the company's ambitious expansion beyond household devices. The vehicle represents a pattern of Chinese consumer electronics firms diversifying aggressively into automotive and technology categories.
content:
The NEXT 01 JET Edition Car at the Dreame NEXT event during the Silicon Valley Summit at the Palace of Fine Arts on April 29, 2026 in San Francisco, CA. | Photo by Kelsey McClellan / The Verge	

When I first heard that a vacuum company had released a rocket-powered electric vehicle with physically impossible-sounding performance specs, I immediately thought James Dyson was up to his old tricks again.
Fortunately, I was wrong. This time the household appliance company trying its hand at super car design is Dreame (pronounced like "dreamy"), a little-known Chinese firm that has grand ambitions to become a global consumer electronics giant. The company held an expo of sorts in San Francisco this week that resulted in a flurry of product announcements. And because we live in an attention economy, and one of the best ways to grab people …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梦想的火箭动力汽车能在0.9秒内完成0-60时速加速，因为你现在可以随便说任何事
zh.summary: 中国家电制造商梦想公司推出了NEXT 01 JET Edition汽车，声称0-60时速加速时间仅为0.9秒，体现了该公司雄心勃勃地拓展家电产品以外的领域。这款车代表了中国消费电子企业积极多元化进入汽车和科技领域的趋势。

title: We just got a new reason to believe the Trump phone is real(ish)
summary: Trump Mobile's T1 phone has achieved PTCRB certification, a required step toward FCC approval and carrier network compatibility in North America. The certification marks progress in a long-delayed phone launch and provides credibility to the project's development status.
content:
Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This time we've discovered a little more evidence that the phone is on its way to a release.
Trump Mobile's T1 Phone has just passed another milestone on its slow road to release. The phone has received the little-known PTCRB certification, a first step toward being certified to work on major networks and be issued with IMEI numbers.
You probably haven't heard of PTCRB certification - I hadn't until recently. It doesn't come up very often. It's the North American certification process for smartp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我们刚刚有了新的理由相信特朗普手机是真的（大概）
zh.summary: 特朗普移动公司的T1手机已获得PTCRB认证，这是获得FCC批准和北美运营商网络兼容性的必要步骤。该认证标志着长期延迟的手机发布取得进展，并证实了该项目的开发状态。

title: Scorpions go terminator mode and reinforce their weapons with metal
summary: Researchers have discovered that scorpions reinforce their stinging appendages with metallic elements, adapting their composition based on hunting strategies and prey types. The finding reveals an unexpected biological adaptation that enhances weapon effectiveness and represents a rare example of animals utilizing metals for structural enhancement.
content: Different hunting patterns seem to dictate different distributions of metal.

zh.title: 蝎子进入终结者模式，用金属强化其武器
zh.summary: 研究人员发现蝎子用金属元素强化其刺针，根据捕猎策略和猎物类型调整成分。这一发现揭示了一种意想不到的生物适应，可增强武器效能，代表了动物利用金属进行结构强化的罕见例子。

title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
summary: The Pentagon has signed agreements with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI systems on classified military networks. The deals reflect the Department of Defense's strategy to diversify AI vendor relationships following its public dispute with Anthropic over model usage terms.
content: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

zh.title: 五角大楼与英伟达、微软和AWS达成协议在机密网络上部署AI
zh.summary: 五角大楼已与英伟达、微软和AWS签署协议在保密军事网络上部署AI系统。这些协议反映了美国防部在与Anthropic就模型使用条款发生公开纠纷后，实现AI供应商关系多元化的战略。

title: GPT-5.5 matches heavily hyped Mythos Preview in new cybersecurity tests
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 has matched the performance of the heavily promoted Mythos Preview model in recent cybersecurity testing, suggesting that advanced capabilities may be more widespread across models than initially thought. The results challenge claims that specific models hold unique advantages in threat intelligence and security applications.
content: New results suggest Mythos' cyber threat isn't "a breakthrough specific to one model."

zh.title: GPT-5.5在新网络安全测试中与炒作已久的Mythos预览版相匹敌
zh.summary: OpenAI的GPT-5.5在最近的网络安全测试中与备受推崇的Mythos预览版模型的性能相匹配，表明先进功能可能在各种模型中的分布比最初预想的更广泛。这些结果质疑了特定模型在威胁情报和安全应用中拥有独特优势的说法。

title: Is your Purosangue SUV not sharp enough? Ferrari has you covered.
summary: Ferrari is introducing a more refined version of its Purosangue SUV with a honed V12 engine as the company prepares to reveal its first electric vehicle. The move showcases Ferrari's strategy to iterate on its existing lineup while transitioning toward electrification.
content: We'll soon get to see the brand's first EV; first, a more honed V12 four-seater.

zh.title: 你的Purosangue SUV还不够犀利？法拉利为你解决
zh.summary: 法拉利正在推出其Purosangue SUV的更精致版本，搭载经过调校的V12发动机，同时该公司准备推出其首款电动汽车。此举展示了法拉利在完善现有产品线的同时向电气化过渡的战略。

title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
summary: A hacktivist group claimed responsibility for DDoS attacks affecting Ubuntu and Canonical services. The outages have prevented users from accessing updates for the Linux-based operating system.
content: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.

zh.title: Ubuntu服务遭DDoS攻击导致中断
zh.summary: 一个黑客组织声称对影响Ubuntu和Canonical服务的DDoS攻击负责。中断事件导致用户无法访问基于Linux操作系统的更新。

title: Virgin Galactic reveals new ship, but it's running out of time and cash
summary: Virgin Galactic revealed a new spacecraft design but has unclear cash reserves to support a prolonged testing phase. It remains uncertain whether the company's financial situation will sustain required development timelines.
content: It's not clear whether Virgin Galactic has the cash reserves to fund a prolonged test phase.

zh.title: 维珍银河公司推出新飞船，但面临时间和现金短缺
zh.summary: 维珍银河公司公布了新飞船设计，但其现金储备不清楚是否足以支持延长的测试阶段。公司的财务状况是否能够维持所需的开发时间表仍然不确定。

title: Apple may take "several months" to catch up to Mac mini and Studio demand
summary: Apple is struggling to meet surging demand for Mac Mini and Studio models due to chip shortages and AI-driven interest. CEO Tim Cook warned that balancing supply with demand could take several months.
content: Chip shortages and demand from AI enthusiasts are both playing a part.

zh.title: Apple 可能需要"数个月"才能赶上 Mac mini 和 Studio 的需求
zh.summary: 由于芯片短缺和人工智能驱动的兴趣，苹果正在努力满足 Mac Mini 和 Studio 型号的激增需求。首席执行官蒂姆·库克警告称，平衡供应与需求可能需要数个月。

title: Musk v. Altman is just getting started
summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI over the company's conversion to for-profit status is escalating, with testimony from Musk already introducing emails, texts, and social media evidence. More witnesses are expected as the case continues.
content: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. Musk’s argument against OpenAI? By converting the company to a for-profit model, Sam Altman betrayed the “nonprofit for the […]

zh.title: 马斯克诉奥尔特曼案才刚刚开始
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 公司转变为营利性公司的诉讼正在升级，马斯克的证词已经引入了电子邮件、文本和社交媒体证据。随着案件继续进行，预计会有更多证人出庭。

title: Women sue the men who used their Instagram feeds to create AI porn influencers
summary: Women are suing the creators of AI ModelForge, a platform that teaches users to generate deepfake AI influencers based on real people's Instagram images. The lawsuit centers on the unauthorized use of women's likenesses to create AI-generated adult content.
content: AI ModelForge is a platform that teaches men how to generate their own AI influencers.

zh.title: 女性起诉利用其 Instagram 信息流创建 AI 色情网红的男性
zh.summary: 女性正在起诉 AI ModelForge 的创造者，该平台教用户根据真实人物的 Instagram 图像生成深度伪造 AI 网红。该诉讼的焦点是未经授权使用女性肖像创建人工智能生成的成人内容。

title: People are finally using Reddit’s search
summary: Reddit's search feature is gaining traction, with CEO Steve Huffman announcing a 30% year-on-year increase in weekly users. This growth suggests the platform's search functionality is becoming increasingly valuable to users seeking specific content and communities.
content: The company saw a 30% year-on-year jump in the number of people using search every week, CEO Steve Huffman said on Thursday.

zh.title: 人们终于开始使用Reddit的搜索功能了
zh.summary: Reddit的搜索功能日益受欢迎，CEO史蒂夫·赫夫曼宣布周活跃用户数同比增长30%。这一增长表明该平台的搜索功能对于寻求特定内容和社区的用户来说正变得越来越有价值。

title: Microsoft wants lawyers to trust its new AI agent in Word documents
summary: Microsoft has launched a specialized AI agent within Word designed specifically for legal teams to review contracts and manage complex documents. The Legal Agent uses structured workflows based on real legal practice rather than general AI models, helping streamline tasks like clause-by-clause contract analysis.
content:
Microsoft is launching a new AI agent inside Word that's specifically designed for legal teams. Legal Agent handles document edits, negotiation history, and complex documents to help legal teams handle tasks like reviewing contracts.
"Instead of relying on general AI models to interpret commands, the agent follows structured workflows shaped by real legal practice, managing clearly defined, repeatable tasks like reviewing contracts clause by clause against a playbook," explains Sumit Chauhan, corporate vice president of Microsoft's Office Product Group. 
The Legal Agent can work with existing documents that have tracked changes, and analyz …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软希望律师信任其Word中的新型AI助手
zh.summary: 微软在Word中推出了一个专为法律团队设计的AI助手，用于审查合同和管理复杂文档。该法律助手采用基于真实法律实践的结构化工作流程而非通用AI模型，有助于简化逐条款合同分析等任务。

title: There's a lot of hype about Chinese EVs—is any of it true?
summary: Chinese electric vehicle manufacturers are focusing heavily on AI integration alongside abundant screens and displays. The article examines whether the industry hype around these features translates to genuine technological advantages or is largely marketing.
content: In addition to being full of screens, China now wants its cars to be packed with AI.

zh.title: 关于中国电动汽车的大肆宣传——其中有真实内容吗？
zh.summary: 中国电动汽车制造商在大力推进AI集成，并配备众多屏幕和显示器。该文章探讨了围绕这些功能的行业宣传是否能转化为真正的技术优势，还是仅仅是营销策略。

title: Dyson finally made a better robot, but a worse vacuum
summary: Dyson's Spot + Scrub Ai combines vacuuming and mopping with solid performance, but uses a third-party motor instead of Dyson's signature technology. For $1,200, the hybrid cleaner excels at mopping but represents a step backward in vacuuming capability compared to Dyson's previous models.
content:
The Dyson Spot + Scrub Ai is Dyson’s first combination robot vacuum and mop. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

I'm deeply conflicted about the Dyson Spot + Scrub Ai robot vacuum and mop. It's the company's best robotic floor cleaner to date, with excellent mopping performance, good navigation and obstacle detection, and a multifunction dock that takes much of the busywork off your hands. But Dyson's first attempt at a vacuum-and-mop combo is a worse vacuum than its predecessors, and that's because there's no Dyson motor in this vacuum.
You read that right. For $1,200, the Spot + Scrub doesn't get you a Dyson vacuum; instead, you're getting a third-party motor and brush system. "It's not one of our V10 motors, it's one of our partner technologies," N …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 戴森终于造出了更好的机器人，但吸尘能力变差了
zh.summary: 戴森的Spot + Scrub Ai结合了吸尘和拖地功能，性能出众，但使用第三方电机而非戴森标志性技术。这款售价1200美元的混合清洁器在拖地方面表现突出，但在吸尘能力上相比戴森之前的型号有所退步。

title: Dyson put someone else’s motor in its robot vacuum
summary: Dyson confirmed that its new Spot & Scrub Ai robot vacuum uses a third-party motor instead of its proprietary V10 technology. The company chose this approach to incorporate new lidar navigation and mopping capabilities while co-engineering with other platforms.
content:
Dyson’s newest robot vacuum adds mopping capabilities but takes away the Dyson motor of its predecessor. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Dyson, a company built on engineering high-speed motors, has confirmed to The Verge that its newest robot vacuum doesn't use a Dyson motor. The recently launched Spot & Scrub Ai robot vacuum and mop was "co-engineered," Nathan Lawson McLean, senior design manager at Dyson, told The Verge. 
According to Lawson McLean, the device merges "new and already existing Dyson technologies with other platforms." Specifically, the new lidar-based navigation tech and the robot's vacuum motor were developed by a third party. "It's not one of our V10 motors; it's one of our partner technologies," said Lawson McLean.

"It's not one of our V10 motors, it's  …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 戴森在其扫地机器人中使用了他人的电机
zh.summary: 戴森确认其新款Spot & Scrub Ai扫地机器人使用第三方电机而非其专有的V10技术。该公司选择这一方案是为了加入新的激光导航和拖地功能，同时与其他平台合作开发。

title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is gaining significant traction in India for creative visual generation, used for avatars and cinematic portraits. The adoption in India contrasts with slower uptake elsewhere, suggesting regional differences in AI image tool adoption.
content: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

zh.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0在印度大受欢迎，但在其他地区表现平平
zh.summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0在印度获得了重大关注，被用于创建头像和电影级肖像的创意视觉生成。印度的采用率与其他地区的缓慢增长形成对比，表明AI图像工具的采用存在区域差异。
